data.title: Atlassian (NASDAQ: TEAM) will release Q2 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026, discussing them at a conference call at 2:00 P.M. PT.
data.description: Software company Atlassian Corporation (NASDAQ: TEAM) revealed it will unveil its financial report for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on December 31, 2025, post-market closure on Thursday, February 5, 2026. The company is set to conduct a conference call to delve into these results at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time. Apart from the earnings press release, Atlassian will also share a document.

data.title: AFBA appoints Gen Larry O. Spencer as new Chair of Board from Jan 1, 2026, praising Gen Craig R. McKinley's 3-year term.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia, the Armed Forces Benefit Association (AFBA) revealed the selection of General Larry O. Spencer, USAF (Ret.), as the new Chair of its board of directors starting on January 1, 2026. General Craig R. McKinley, the outgoing Chair, served in this role for the prior 3 years. AFBA expressed profound appreciation for General McKinley's outstanding leadership and steadfast dedication. During his tenure, his contributions significantly enhanced the organization's mission and served as an inspiration to all involved.

data.title: Belden Inc. priced €450 million private offering of 4.250% senior subordinated notes due 2033 at 100% issue price.
data.description: St. Louis-based Belden Inc., a prominent provider of specialty networking solutions worldwide, revealed the pricing details of its private offering. The offering, known as the “Notes Offering”, amounts to €450 million in total principal with a 4.250% interest rate, set to mature in 2033. The Notes were priced at 100% of their principal value. Belden anticipates the offering to be finalized on January 28, 2026, pending standard closing formalities. Additionally, the Notes will be backed by a senior subordinated guarantee.

data.title: BILL to report Q2 2026 results on Feb 5, 2026. Serving half a million businesses. Conference call at 1:30pm PT. Business Wire.
data.description: In San Jose, California, BILL (NYSE:BILL), a finance platform used by 500,000 businesses, will release its fiscal Q2 results on February 5, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call by management is scheduled for 1:30 p.m. PT to review the outcomes. Interested individuals can access the financial report and a live webcast of the call.

data.title: Sonos to report Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 3, 2026. Ended Dec 27, 2025. Check press release at investors.sonos.com. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Sonos, Inc. (Nasdaq: SONO) from Santa Barbara, Calif., is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ended December 27, 2025, after the market closes on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. The company will provide a press release and slide presentation which can be viewed at https://investors.sonos.com/reports-and-filings/default.aspx#section=earningsreports. Following the release, Sonos will conduct a conference call and Q&A session to delve into the details of the results.

data.title: EA will announce Q3 financial results for the quarter ended Dec 31, 2025, on Feb 3, 2026. No earnings call due to acquisition news. Website for materials.
data.description: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) is set to report its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The results will be disclosed post-market closure on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. Notably, due to the recent news of EA entering a definitive acquisition agreement, there will be no scheduled earnings conference call. Interested parties can access the financial results and related content through EA’s website at http://ir.ea.com. Stay tuned for further updates on EA's business developments.

data.title: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) to announce Q2 2026 results on Jan 27, after US market closes. Conference call at 2:00 PM PT.
data.description: Singapore-based Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a prominent mass-capacity data storage innovator, is scheduled to announce its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the US market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. The investment community conference call regarding these results will occur on the same day at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET. For those interested, the live audio webcast will be available on Seagate’s Investor Relations website at investors.seagate.com.

data.title: Crane NXT (NYSE: CXT) sets dates for Q4 and full year 2025 earnings release and call in Waltham, Mass.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, on January 13, 2026, Crane NXT, Co. (NYSE: CXT), a leading industrial technology firm, unveiled its timetable for releasing the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.

data.title: ICF wins $300M contracts in Europe, to provide services across 27 EU states. Leading global provider.
data.description: A prominent global solutions and technology provider, ICF (NASDAQ: ICFI), has been chosen by European institutions to offer services in all 27 EU member states. The company recently announced on January 13, 2026, that it has secured two major contracts for this purpose.

data.title: Realty Income declares 667th consecutive common stock monthly dividend at $0.2700 per share.
data.description: Real Estate Investment Company, Realty Income Corporation, popularly known as The Monthly Dividend Company®, disclosed on January 13, 2026, that they have approved their 667th uninterrupted common stock monthly dividend. The dividend payout stands at $0.2700 per share, equivalent to an annualized amount.

data.title: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) will release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on schedule.
data.description: Rollins, Inc., a leading global consumer and commercial services company, has revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 13, 2026. The report will cover the period ending on December 31, 2025, and will be shared with the public after the market closes. Rollins, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ROL, is anticipated to disclose key figures such as revenue, profits, and other financial metrics in this update.
Mitch McConnell reveals recent stock trades featuring updates on LAZR.

data.title: Array sold spectrum assets to AT&T for $1.018 billion, declares $10.25/share dividend. Deal closed successfully.
data.description: The decision has been made by the board to issue a special dividend of $10.25 per share, as disclosed in Chicago on January 13, 2026. Array Digital Infrastructure, Inc.SM (NYSE: AD) (ArraySM) confirmed the finalization of the agreement with AT&T (NYSE: T) to sell a section of the Company's holdings.

data.title: Lil Uzi Vert's "What You Saying" hits No. 1 on Billboard's Hot Rap Songs, R&B/Hip-Hop Streaming Songs, and Rap Streaming Songs.
data.description: Today, the single "What You Saying" by Lil Uzi Vert has achieved significant success, climbing to the top of multiple Billboard charts. The track is now No. 1 on the Hot Rap Songs Chart, the R&B/Hip-Hop Streaming Songs chart, and the Rap Streaming Songs chart. This accomplishment marks a major milestone for the artist, solidifying his position as a global trailblazer in the music industry. The single's success can be attributed to its popularity, securing the top spots on these influential music charts.

data.title: Ameresco (NYSE: AMRC) to reveal Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Mar 2, 2026 after market close. Earnings call at 4:30 pm EST. Website for release: www.ameresco.com.
data.description: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent energy infrastructure solutions provider listed on the NYSE (Ticker: AMRC), revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on March 2, 2026. The earnings report will be accessible on the Company’s website at www.ameresco.com post-market closure on that day. Additionally, Ameresco will conduct an earnings conference call at 4:30 p.m. EST. Investors and stakeholders can join the call to delve deeper into the numbers and analyses.

data.title: Ziegler closes $47.9M financing for Bishop Gadsden Episcopal Retirement Community in successful Series 2025 Bonds closing.
data.description: In Chicago on January 13, 2026, Ziegler revealed the completion of the $47.9 million Series 2025 Bonds for Bishop Gadsden Episcopal Retirement Community. The nonprofit life plan community, situated on James Island, is owned and operated by Bishop Gadsden.
